And then if that requires us to recommend a tool or to utilize one.
And we will kind of do the vetting and come to you with a little bit of an understanding of what executing on some of the best case scenario content would look like.
Cool.
Yeah, I think, you know, at this point.
It wouldn't be going too far to see what Service Titan has done.
Take one example that I've given you, work with your design team and say, we played around and like whatever.
We got the free trial of this subscription that we might recommend to you.
We played with it.
And here's something that you can look at as an approximation of what's possible, right?
Host it on some staging site that you have, you know, like it's just a mock-up.
Just do it in Figma, right?
Like something.
And that gives me a sense that like, you know, we're tracking in the right direction here.
It's really sort of piecemeal.
And I feel like we really need a.
Your strategy for, like, what is our traffic target?
What are the keywords we care the most about?
Like, if AI receptionist, you know, AI answering service are the most important things that we want to dominate, what strategy are you guys recommending?

And if we agree that this template and tools approach is wise and Google's still valuing, like, those assets like it historically has, then, like, this is an approximation of, like, what it could look like, including the design team, not, like, you know, giving me something that's stuck in my mind is, like, not really well designed, you know?
So that's going to give me a much better sense of, like, confidence moving forward.
I don't want to be driving all of the confidence, all of the, like, strategy and tactics here as much as I feel like I have been.
And so I would love to, you know, and we don't have to do everything.
Like in a weekly meeting, if you have some ideas or you want to send me a loom video or just async, that's totally fine.
I would almost prefer it because I feel like there's a little bit of a surprise element in these meetings that might not work to our advantage.
Totally.
Totally hear you.
Thank you for the input today and then also just for like the feedback and wrapping it up there.
Totally hear you.
It's on us to now have like a little bit of an alignment internally and then come back to you with like a little bit more of a definitive plan and strategy, which we will do.
And I know that we're over, so I'm going to let you go.
But thank you very much.
And thank you, Elvis, for preparing that today.
And I'm really glad that we could talk about it live.
And it's on us to discuss it internally from here.
OK, great.
Looking forward to it.
Thank you.
Thank you both.
Bye.
Thank you.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Smith.ai's content strategy and align on priorities for GrowthX's SEO efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on bottom-funnel, high-intent content like interactive tools/calculators and templates rather than broad hub pages](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [Use ServiceTitan as inspiration for content types, but tailor to Smith.ai's unique offerings (e.g. AI receptionist, outsourcing vs. hiring)](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=2233.0)
  - [Prioritize HTML/interactive content over gated PDFs to improve user experience and SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop more concrete strategy recommendations and mock-ups for review](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=2167.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Move away from broad hub pages to more targeted, bottom-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)
  - [Focus on creating interactive tools, calculators, and templates](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=2048.0)
  - [Aim for content that directly addresses user intent (e.g. "should I hire or outsource?")](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
  - [Prioritize content that can show clear ROI and move the needle quickly](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)

### Inspiration from Competitors

  - [ServiceTitan's approach with interactive tools and templates viewed positively](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=2011.0)
  - [Good Call's content clusters (e.g. answering service, appointment scheduling) noted](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=2048.0)
  - [Aim to fill gaps in Smith.ai's current content offerings compared to competitors](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=2019.0)

### Interactive Content Development

  - [Preference for HTML-based interactive content over static PDFs](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [Examples: ROI calculators, cost comparisons (hiring vs. outsourcing), business valuation tools](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
  - [Ensure all interactive elements are on one page for better user experience](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [Potential to repurpose existing blog content into interactive formats](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)

### AI-Focused Content

  - [Maintain AI-related content, but ensure it's closely tied to Smith.ai's specific offerings](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)
  - [Position Smith.ai as experts in both AI and answering services](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
  - [Consider content on AI tools that complement Smith.ai's services (e.g. AI copywriting tools for social media)](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=2089.0)

### Design and Presentation

  - [Emphasize clean, professional design for all content](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1854.0)
  - [Aim for visuals that are appealing to small business owners and easy to understand/use](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1858.0)
  - [Consider leveraging existing Smith.ai design templates (e.g. integrations page layout)](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to internally discuss and refine content strategy based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=2167.0)
  - [Develop more concrete keyword and traffic targets for priority topics](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
  - [Create mock-ups or prototypes of proposed interactive content for review](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=2240.0)
  - [Consider using Figma or a staging site to showcase potential designs](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=2258.0)
  - [Prepare async updates (e.g. Loom videos) for more efficient communication between meetings](https://fathom.video/share/n3ecAU_iA34cwgKWQbNssm-_9Yx_HNXv?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)

action_items.description: Research HTML/interactive tools for creating calculators and templates similar to ServiceTitan examples
Identify gaps in Smith.ai's content vs competitors, focus on outsourcing vs in-house hiring, AI receptionist
Sync with Elvis on content strategy approach, focusing on low-hanging fruit and ServiceTitan as north star
Create mock-up of interactive tool/template (e.g. in Figma) as example of execution capabilities
Prepare draft strategy for targeting key keywords (e.g. AI receptionist, AI answering service)
Compile internal alignment on definitive plan/strategy to present to Maddy asynchronously (e.g. Loom video)
